title: Cobblemon/Create Crushable Evo Stone Ores
description: Datapack that adds Create crusher recipes for Cobblemon's ore stones. These recipes follow the pattern set by Create when it comes to crushable ore blocks.
body:
A small datapack to add similar crushing recipes that the vanilla ores in Minecraft have thanks to Create. While not as useful as automation of these isn't as important as other ores, it's nice to have especially in a multiplayer environment.

![Deepslate thunder stone ore crush recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf9d04f287c92cbb7b093721b91be3a69d8711f8.png)

![terracotta sun stone ore crush recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19bc428f9f567499e856dac262e92be065cd8484.png)
